name: spec-driven-develop
description: Two complementary AI agent skills for spec-driven development and structured deep discussion.

interface.shortDescription: Architecture-first planning and structured technical discussion for AI coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Spec-Driven Develop adds two Markdown-based workflows for Codex: a six-phase development pipeline for large project transformations (analysis, planning, tracking, and execution), and Deep Discuss for disciplined problem analysis, brainstorming, and solution design.
defaultPrompt: Use spec-driven development to plan this migration.
Help me analyze this technical problem deeply.
Create a phased implementation plan for this refactor.
